info.name: Smart Venue Booking - Robust API Testing
info.description:
Collection Postman yang lebih tahan banting untuk demo API Smart Venue & Event Booking Management. Collection ini membuat data testing sendiri dulu, jadi tidak bergantung pada ID seed seperti venue 1, 2, 4, atau 6. Jalankan dari atas ke bawah memakai Collection Runner.

Urutan aman: Auth Login → Setup Data → API Tests → Cleanup.

Default account dari seed:
- email: admin@smartvenue.id
- password: Admin@1234

request.description: Login admin dan simpan JWT ke variable token.
Pastikan endpoint protected menolak request tanpa token.

item.name: 01 - Setup Dynamic Test Data
item.description: Membuat data sendiri agar test tidak bergantung pada seed ID tertentu.

request.description: Venue available untuk test create/update booking.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Postman Available Venue {{$timestamp}}",
  "location": "Postman Test Area",
  "capacity": 300,
  "facilities": "AC, Proyektor, Sound System",
  "price_per_day": 2500000,
  "status": "available",
  "description": "Venue available khusus testing Postman."
}

{
  "name": "Postman Maintenance Venue {{$timestamp}}",
  "location": "Maintenance Area",
  "capacity": 120,
  "facilities": "AC",
  "price_per_day": 1000000,
  "status": "maintenance",
  "description": "Venue maintenance untuk negative test."
}

{
  "name": "Postman Small Venue {{$timestamp}}",
  "location": "Small Room",
  "capacity": 10,
  "facilities": "Whiteboard",
  "price_per_day": 500000,
  "status": "available",
  "description": "Venue kecil untuk test kapasitas."
}

{
  "name": "Postman Active Venue {{$timestamp}}",
  "location": "Active Booking Area",
  "capacity": 200,
  "facilities": "AC, Stage",
  "price_per_day": 2200000,
  "status": "available",
  "description": "Venue untuk test delete venue yang masih punya booking aktif."
}

item.name: Create Active Booking for Active Venue

request.description: Membuat booking aktif agar test delete venue dengan active booking tidak bergantung seed.

body.raw:
{
  "venue_id": {{active_venue_id}},
  "event_name": "Postman Active Booking {{$timestamp}}",
  "organizer_name": "Postman Runner",
  "start_date": "{{dynamic_date}}",
  "end_date": "{{dynamic_date}}",
  "start_time": "09:00",
  "end_time": "12:00",
  "attendees": 50,
  "booking_status": "pending",
  "payment_status": "unpaid",
  "notes": "Booking aktif agar delete venue menghasilkan 400."
}

{
  "name": "Postman Conflict Venue {{$timestamp}}",
  "location": "Conflict Area",
  "capacity": 250,
  "facilities": "AC, Sound",
  "price_per_day": 3000000,
  "status": "available",
  "description": "Venue untuk test jadwal bentrok."
}

request.description: Booking dasar. Request conflict akan memakai venue/tanggal ini.

body.raw:
{
  "venue_id": {{conflict_venue_id}},
  "event_name": "Postman Base Conflict Booking {{$timestamp}}",
  "organizer_name": "Postman Runner",
  "start_date": "{{conflict_date}}",
  "end_date": "{{conflict_date}}",
  "start_time": "18:00",
  "end_time": "23:00",
  "attendees": 80,
  "booking_status": "confirmed",
  "payment_status": "paid",
  "notes": "Booking dasar untuk memicu conflict."
}

exec: pm.test('Venue updated', () => { pm.expect(json.name).to.equal('Postman Available Venue Updated'); pm.expect(json.capacity).to.equal(350); });

request.description: Venue ini dibuat di setup dan punya booking pending, jadi harus 400.

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Postman Disposable Venue {{$timestamp}}",
  "location": "Disposable Area",
  "capacity": 50,
  "facilities": "AC",
  "price_per_day": 750000,
  "status": "available",
  "description": "Venue sementara untuk test DELETE success."
}

{
  "venue_id": {{available_venue_id}},
  "event_name": "Postman CRUD Booking {{$timestamp}}",
  "organizer_name": "Postman Runner",
  "start_date": "{{dynamic_date}}",
  "end_date": "{{dynamic_date}}",
  "start_time": "09:00",
  "end_time": "12:00",
  "attendees": 70,
  "booking_status": "pending",
  "payment_status": "unpaid",
  "notes": "Booking sukses untuk test CRUD."
}

exec: pm.test('Mentions unavailable venue', () => pm.expect(String(json.message).toLowerCase()).to.satisfy(m => m.includes('maintenance') || m.includes('tidak dapat') || m.includes('available')));

request.description: Harus memakai tanggal yang sama dengan base conflict booking. Namun dynamic_date bisa berubah oleh test lain. Karena itu collection ini menjalankan ulang pre-request untuk set conflict_date? We'll adjust.

item.name: 99 - Cleanup Optional
item.description: Opsional. Jalankan di akhir demo untuk membersihkan data Postman. Beberapa cleanup boleh 200 atau 404 agar tetap aman kalau data sudah pernah dihapus.
